grades.expectation: Response identifies this as requiring enhanced due diligence (EDD)
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions EDD requirements and when to apply them in section 9

grades.expectation: Response mentions source country risk assessment or FATF status
grades.reason: While it mentions reviewing high-risk sectors/jurisdictions, it doesn't specifically address FATF status or formal country risk assessment

grades.expectation: Response requires SWIFT/wire transfer confirmations or equivalent transfer evidence
grades.reason: Section 3 requires bank statements showing transfers and evidence of transfer from original source account
Section 7 specifically addresses currency exchange issues and asks whether currency conversion occurred

grades.expectation: Response mentions suspicious activity report (SAR) obligation if concerns arise
grades.reason: Final section explicitly mentions considering whether a SAR is required if things don't add up
